mapper.sql: id, course_id, months, price, voucher_amount, status, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_course_price_plan WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_course_price_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_course_price_plan (course_id, months, price, voucher_amount, status, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{months}, #{price}, #{voucherAmount}, #{status}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_course_price_plan SET months = #{months}, price = #{price}, voucher_amount = #{voucherAmount}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_course_price_plan SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_course_price_plan SET deleted = 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
